mapper.select:
select ui.`id`, ui.code, ui.name, ui.sex, ui.birthday, ui.id_card, ui.native_place, ui.address, ui.email, ui.`type`, ui.images, ui.create_date, ui.remark, ui.score, ui.user_id, tu.status from user_info ui LEFT JOIN t_user tu ON (tu.user_id = ui.user_id) where 1 = 1
AND ui.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{userInfo.name},'%')
AND ui.code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{userInfo.code},'%')
AND ui.type= #{userInfo.type}
AND ui.id_card LIKE CONCAT('%',#{userInfo.idCard},'%')
order by ui.create_date desc
